message: Project scaffold, skill, capture scripts, tests, docs, and FreeCut reference created.
34 feature entries seeded in feature-inventory.md and feature-matrix.json.
.harness/* files created with empty run state.
Chromium + Chromium Headless Shell downloaded (183.6 MiB + 113.6 MiB).
3 viewports captured. network=71, console=18, bundles=15, assets=8.
28 interactive nodes; 4 click attempts; landmarks=header+main+tablist. localStorage keys: idb_migration_v1_done, lastCleanup_thumbnailCache.
bundle-analysis.md written.
storage-model.md written.
visual-spec, interaction-spec, component-map, implementation-plan, gaps, handoff all regenerated.
33 passed, 6 skipped (fixture media). 2.2m total. All non-fixture parity tests green.
Public GitHub repo created at github.com/K-Jadeja/owned-site-rebuilder-lab.
Initial commit 70134da pushed: 113 files, 15 PNGs, 5.0 MB. Includes all source, screenshots, reports, and feature inventory.
scripts/deep-probe.mjs launched; targeting F007,F008,F013,F015,F016,F017,F019,F020,F030,F031.
deep probe finished; 30 network entries, 33 console msgs; 10 feature JSONs written.

feature-inventory.md, feature-matrix.json, state-model.md, event-map.md, acceptance-tests.md, feature-parity.md, handoff.md, verification.md, features.json, progress.md updated with deep-probe findings.
Pressing Space added 'advanced-timeline-store' to localStorage — strongest observable playback behavior so far.
Click Export Video opens dialog with 720p/1080p/4K + Start Export; 'Rendered in your browser' notice.
Track header buttons have draggable=true (title='Reorder track'). Clip drag selectors need refinement.
sample.mp4 (71178B h264+aac 5s), sample.mp3 (40585B mp3 5.04s), sample.png (886B 320x240) generated via ffmpeg; ffprobe-verified.
Fixture-media tests unskipped; all 17 desktop parity tests now pass.
Commit 8f99bbb pushed to github.com/K-Jadeja/owned-site-rebuilder-lab: 72 files, including 3 fixtures, 30 PNGs, deep-probe script, updated docs and harness state.
Branch deep-bundle-runtime-decoupling checked out.
SKILL.md updated with Deep Bundle + Runtime Decoupling Mode + proof quality ladder + 4 reference docs.
.rebuild/target-source and .rebuild/private created with README files. .gitignore updated.
acorn, acorn-walk, es-module-lexer, js-beautify, source-map, terser, fast-glob installed.
13 bundles fetched (11 JS + 2 CSS), 0 source maps exposed.
0 high / 0 medium findings. 13 bundles promoted to target-source.
11 JS + 2 CSS bundles parsed, 12 libraries fingerprinted, 40+ feature keyword hits.
10 actions covered with JS + CSS coverage.
22 storage mutations captured; advanced-timeline-store decoded as Zustand persist.
918 elements with fiber keys; Radix UI primitives identified.
advanced-timeline-store decoded: {state: {trackDensity: default}, version: 0}
sample.mp4 uploaded, bodyText + storage mutated, ThumbnailCache logs captured.
82 candidate selectors mined.
3 new test files added. 33/33 desktop tests pass. 24 hard_proof, 9 soft_probe.
api-contracts.md/.json rewritten from runtime logs. No backend API observed during public demo flows.
feature-parity.md rewritten with strict proof-level table.
feature-inventory.md + feature-matrix.json updated with proof_level + evidence fields.
paper/ created with 10 files: README, outline, method, evidence-table, limitations, reproducibility, figures, 3 appendices.
progress.md, decisions.md, verification.md, handoff.md, features.json updated.

Commit 47acec2 pushed to github.com/K-Jadeja/owned-site-rebuilder-lab branch deep-bundle-runtime-decoupling: 119 files, including 13 audited bundles, paper/, deep-import/, runtime/, feature analysis, 3 new test specs.
